overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing the protagonist Geralt walking through the colorful medieval city of Beauclair. The character navigates cobblestone streets, scenic terraces overlooking mountain valleys, and covered walkways on a bright sunny day.

weathered stone facade with small windows
large stone archway marking the town entrance
tall tower with clock visible above the rooftops
brightly colored yellow and blue half-timbered building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cobblestone street flanked by historic stone cottages. Geralt walks steadily uphill toward a prominent stone archway, while a horse rider moves away in the distance. The architecture features traditional European medieval styling with colorful accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with red plaster building and terrace overlook

events.description: passes through stone archway into more open terrace area with valley view

agents.ego_description: walking past the red plaster building and along the terrace edge overlooking the valley

dog walking across the cobblestone street

entered.detail: vibrant red-orange plaster building with stone trim and wooden roof
low stone balustrade overlooking the valley

mature deciduous tree providing shade on the terrace

segments.scene_description: Passing through the archway, the scene opens into a sunlit terrace area with a striking red plaster building on the right. The camera reveals a stunning mountain valley view beyond the stone balustrade. A woman stands by a doorway and a dog crosses the path as Geralt continues forward.

segments.scene_description: The segment features a wide-open terrace with panoramic valley views. Geralt walks past large potted red flowers and a stone balustrade, with the mountain scenery stretching into the distance. A woman stands by a doorway on the left as the path continues along the terrace edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyways between stone buildings with market stalls

events.description: bright sun flare appears as camera turns directly toward the sun

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages and turning left past wooden market stalls

notable_agents.action: merchant standing behind wooden stall arranging goods

entered.detail: tight stone walls creating a narrow passage
bright lens flare from direct sunlight
structural wooden beams crossing overhead
cobblestone steps leading downward

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into narrow enclosed alleyways between stone buildings. A bright sun flare dominates the view as Geralt turns a corner. Wooden market stalls line the path, and stone steps appear leading downward. The merchant stands by his goods as the character navigates the tight space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with wooden pergola and merchant sign

events.description: enters covered pergola walkway with dappled sunlight filtering through

agents.ego_description: walking down stone steps and proceeding under the covered pergola walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends stone steps into a covered walkway shaded by a wooden pergola. A prominent yellow merchant sign with a tree emblem hangs on the right, while purple flowers bloom on the left. The lighting shifts to dappled shade as Geralt passes under the cover, with an armed guard standing watch nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined medieval street that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit terrace overlooking a vast mountain valley. It begins on a narrow cobblestone path flanked by historic stone cottages, following Geralt as he walks uphill toward a prominent stone archway. As he passes through the arch, the scene expands into a bright terrace area featuring a striking red plaster building and a stone balustrade. The camera then continues forward past a woman in a doorway and a crossing dog, shifting from the enclosed architecture to a panoramic vista. Finally, the view opens completely across the wide terrace, moving past large potted red flowers as the mountain scenery stretches into the far distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched alleyway into a shaded, flower-lined walkway. It begins in a narrow passage between stone buildings, where a dominant sun flare washes over the view as the camera turns a corner past wooden market stalls and a waiting merchant. As the path narrows, the camera descends a set of stone steps, causing the intense sunlight to give way to the dappled shade of a wooden pergola. The scene then shifts into a covered walkway, passing a prominent yellow merchant sign with a tree emblem and vibrant purple flowers. Finally, the movement continues under the overhead cover, gliding past an armed guard standing watch in the cool shadows.
